name: @wui-js/environment
author: Sergio E. Belmar V. <wuijs.project@gmail.com>
description: WUI/JS Environment Lib — Native bridge for WebView/WKWebView (web layer)

scripts.prepack: rm README.md && cp NPM.md README.md && cp -r src/wui-js/environment/. .
scripts.postpack: rm -f README.md && ln -s docs/README-en.md README.md && ls src/wui-js/environment/ | grep -vE '^LICENSE$' | xargs rm -rf
